flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Spartanburg Community College rose 44% between 2017 and 2020 ($4.5k → $6.5k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Spartanburg Community College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (2.7% → 0.0%).
